assets.title: Shinrin Domain
assets.notes: Wide cinematic iyashikei forest landscape at early morning. Towering cedar trees, moss-covered shrine steps, soft komorebi light rays through canopy, gentle mist in valleys, tea terraces in mid-distance. Muted sage and cedar brown palette. Soft watercolor anime background style, nostalgic and healing mood. No people, no text.

assets.title: Naminami Domain
assets.notes: Wide cinematic iyashikei coastal landscape at dawn. Calm inlet, weathered fishing boats, distant headlands, pale pink sky reflecting on still water. Small wooden pier, seabirds, soft sea-mist blues and shell-white tones. Soft watercolor anime background, peaceful slice-of-life mood. No people, no text.

assets.title: Akari Domain
assets.notes: Wide cinematic iyashikei countryside at golden hour. Rolling harvest hills, orchard trees, warm lantern glow from distant village, long amber shadows. Terraced fields, woodsmoke wisps, copper and honey palette. Soft watercolor anime background, warm hearth mood. No people, no text.

assets.title: Takane Domain
assets.notes: Wide cinematic iyashikei highland landscape. Windmills on a grassy ridge, wildflowers bending in breeze, layered clouds, distant violet mountains. Open sky, lavender and meadow-green palette. Soft watercolor anime background, airy tranquil mood. No people, no text.

assets.title: Moss Lantern Shrine
assets.notes: Hillside Shinto shrine overgrown with moss, stone lanterns along worn steps, cedar forest backdrop, morning mist, soft green-gold komorebi light. Intimate framing, healing iyashikei watercolor style. No people.

assets.title: Dew Terrace
assets.notes: Layered Japanese tea terraces at sunrise, dew glitter on leaves, narrow stone paths, distant farmhouse with thin smoke. Fresh cool greens, gentle slope composition. Iyashikei watercolor background. No people.

assets.title: Cedar Pass
assets.notes: Ancient cedar forest footpath, dappled sunlight through tall trunks, soft needle carpet, hint of stream sound implied by mossy rocks. Deep forest greens, tunnel-of-trees perspective. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.

assets.title: Morning Pier
assets.notes: Weathered wooden pier into calm inlet at dawn, small fishing boats moored, pink horizon, mirror-still water, gulls. Quiet coastal village edge. Sea-mist blues and blush dawn tones. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.

assets.title: Tidal Rock Garden
assets.notes: Japanese-inspired tidal rock garden at low tide, raked sand patterns between smooth stones, shallow tide pools, heron standing still. Minimal zen composition, soft grey-blue palette. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.

assets.title: Lantern Bay
assets.notes: Sheltered bay at twilight, paper lanterns along waterfront, warm village lights reflecting on dark water, gentle hills. Indigo twilight and warm lantern amber. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.

assets.title: Harvest Hill
assets.notes: Gentle hill orchard at late afternoon golden hour, fruit-laden trees, wooden ladders, long striped shadows on grass. Warm copper and green-gold palette. Iyashikei watercolor countryside. No people.

assets.title: Festival Lantern Lane
assets.notes: Narrow village lane with summer festival paper lanterns and banners, food stall steam, warm amber evening light, festive but calm atmosphere. Iyashikei watercolor, no crowds — empty lane after setup. No people.

assets.title: Onsen Valley Outlook
assets.notes: Wooden veranda outlook over misty onsen valley, autumn maples, rising hot spring steam, copper sunset sky. Warm hearth mood, layered depth. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.

assets.title: Windmill Ridge
assets.notes: Old wooden windmills on grassy highland ridge, wildflowers bending in wind, cloud shadows on sunlit pasture below. Open airy composition, meadow green and sky lavender. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.

assets.title: Cloud Pasture
assets.notes: High meadow pasture with grazing sheep (distant small shapes only), fence line curving toward violet mountain peak, clouds at eye level. Ethereal highland calm. Iyashikei watercolor. No human figures.

assets.title: Wind Chime Summit
assets.notes: Mountain shrine summit with rows of glass wind chimes, terraced stone steps below, vast open sky, breeze implied by swaying chimes and grass. Clear crystalline highlights. Iyashikei watercolor. No people.
